news.title: Morgan Stanley retains Underweight rating on Wipro, sets target at 242.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley retains Underweight rating on Wipro, sets target at 242.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley maintains Underweight on Wipro with a ₹242 target, citing ~$2bn buyback (~8.5% market cap).
Strong cash position may boost sentiment, but weak FY27 revenue growth remains a key overhang.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley maintains Underweight on Wipro with a ₹242 target, citing ~$2bn buyback (~8.5% market cap).
Strong cash position may boost sentiment, but weak FY27 revenue growth remains a key overhang.

news.title:
Nifty IT index gained 9% in April; midcap IT outperformed largecap peers.
TCS results met expectations; Wipro announced a buyback, Infosys ADRs fell 1.5%.
news.summary:
Nifty IT index gained 9% in April; midcap IT outperformed largecap peers.
TCS results met expectations; Wipro announced a buyback, Infosys ADRs fell 1.5%.

news.title:
Infosys ADR fell 2.6% and Wipro ADR declined 1% after TCS reported a 2.4% CC revenue degrowth in FY26.
TCS's Q4 net profit rose 29% to Rs 13,720 crore, driven by AI focus with partnerships like Anthropic and Nvidia.
news.summary:
Infosys ADR fell 2.6% and Wipro ADR declined 1% after TCS reported a 2.4% CC revenue degrowth in FY26.
TCS's Q4 net profit rose 29% to Rs 13,720 crore, driven by AI focus with partnerships like Anthropic and Nvidia.

news.title:
Wipro to consider equity share buyback on April 16 alongside Q4 results; first since June 2023.
Investec estimates a potential buyback of ₹16,000 crore; Wipro holds ₹41,000 crore in net cash.
news.summary:
Wipro to consider equity share buyback on April 16 alongside Q4 results; first since June 2023.
Investec estimates a potential buyback of ₹16,000 crore; Wipro holds ₹41,000 crore in net cash.

news.title:
Wipro's board to discuss equity share buyback proposal on April 15-16, 2026.
Outcome of the meeting will be shared with exchanges per SEBI LODR regulations.
news.summary:
Wipro's board to discuss equity share buyback proposal on April 15-16, 2026.
Outcome of the meeting will be shared with exchanges per SEBI LODR regulations.

news.title:
TCS to announce Q4FY26 results on April 9, followed by Infosys, HCL Tech, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra. Brokerages favor HCL Tech and Tech Mahindra.
Nifty IT index down 23% YTD amid AI disruption fears; Motilal Oswal sees FY27 guidance, demand outlook, and deal wins as key investor focus.
news.summary:
TCS to announce Q4FY26 results on April 9, followed by Infosys, HCL Tech, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra. Brokerages favor HCL Tech and Tech Mahindra.
Nifty IT index down 23% YTD amid AI disruption fears; Motilal Oswal sees FY27 guidance, demand outlook, and deal wins as key investor focus.

news.title:
Wipro's deal with Mindsprint highlights increased M&A activity in Indian IT.
The trend emerges as Indian IT faces slowing growth, prompting strategic moves.
news.summary:
Wipro's deal with Mindsprint highlights increased M&A activity in Indian IT.
The trend emerges as Indian IT faces slowing growth, prompting strategic moves.

news.title: Emkay Global issues a 'Reduce' rating on Wipro; CMP at 204.7.
news.summary: Emkay Global issues a 'Reduce' rating on Wipro; CMP at 204.7.

news.title:
Wipro to announce Q4FY26 results on April 16; brokerages predict muted performance due to wage hikes and integration costs.
Nuvama expects 9% YoY profit decline; Kotak projects 3% rise. Revenue growth driven by Harman acquisition and FX benefits.
news.summary:
Wipro to announce Q4FY26 results on April 16; brokerages predict muted performance due to wage hikes and integration costs.
Nuvama expects 9% YoY profit decline; Kotak projects 3% rise. Revenue growth driven by Harman acquisition and FX benefits.

news.title: Nifty crosses 23,100 led by gains in Wipro, HCLTech, and Hindalco.
news.summary: Nifty crosses 23,100 led by gains in Wipro, HCLTech, and Hindalco.

news.title:
Markets decline as Trump's Iran deadline looms; Nifty falls below 22,800, Sensex down 698 points, crude oil surges to $115.
Hindalco and Wipro gain on Nifty; broader markets see losses led by IndiGo, Eicher Motors, and Adani Enterprises.
news.summary:
Markets decline as Trump's Iran deadline looms; Nifty falls below 22,800, Sensex down 698 points, crude oil surges to $115.
Hindalco and Wipro gain on Nifty; broader markets see losses led by IndiGo, Eicher Motors, and Adani Enterprises.

news.title:
Experts recommend 6 stocks for the short term, including Axis Bank, Nykaa, Coal India, Wipro, Trent, and CCL Products.
Key targets: Axis Bank (₹1,343-1,365), Nykaa (₹275-282), Coal India (₹500), Wipro (₹220), Trent (₹4,100), CCL (₹1,210-1,240).
news.summary:
Experts recommend 6 stocks for the short term, including Axis Bank, Nykaa, Coal India, Wipro, Trent, and CCL Products.
Key targets: Axis Bank (₹1,343-1,365), Nykaa (₹275-282), Coal India (₹500), Wipro (₹220), Trent (₹4,100), CCL (₹1,210-1,240).

news.title:
Investec suggests Wipro may consider a Rs 16,000 crore share buyback.
This indicates potential capital return and focus on shareholder value.
news.summary:
Investec suggests Wipro may consider a Rs 16,000 crore share buyback.
This indicates potential capital return and focus on shareholder value.

news.title:
Wipro shares rose 1.8% to ₹198.49 on a $1B Olam deal and Mindsprint acquisition.
The deal bolsters Wipro's agri-tech presence; stock down 25.7% YTD, underperforming Nifty.
news.summary:
Wipro shares rose 1.8% to ₹198.49 on a $1B Olam deal and Mindsprint acquisition.
The deal bolsters Wipro's agri-tech presence; stock down 25.7% YTD, underperforming Nifty.

news.title:
Wipro wins 8-year contract with Olam Group worth $1B; $800M committed.
Olam Group, majority owned by Temasek, valued at over $50B.
news.summary:
Wipro wins 8-year contract with Olam Group worth $1B; $800M committed.
Olam Group, majority owned by Temasek, valued at over $50B.

news.title:
Wipro signs definitive agreement to acquire 100% stake in Mindsprint Pte. Ltd.
The $375M deal aims to strengthen Olam Group partnership, expected completion by June 30, 2026.
news.summary:
Wipro signs definitive agreement to acquire 100% stake in Mindsprint Pte. Ltd.
The $375M deal aims to strengthen Olam Group partnership, expected completion by June 30, 2026.

news.title:
Wipro's Board to meet on April 15-16, 2026, to approve Q4 and FY26 financials.
Trading window for Wipro closed from March 16 to April 18, 2026.
news.summary:
Wipro's Board to meet on April 15-16, 2026, to approve Q4 and FY26 financials.
Trading window for Wipro closed from March 16 to April 18, 2026.

news.title:
Wipro launches AI Native Business Platforms unit, focusing on AI-powered platforms.
The new unit aims to boost growth; senior leadership appointments announced.
news.summary:
Wipro launches AI Native Business Platforms unit, focusing on AI-powered platforms.
The new unit aims to boost growth; senior leadership appointments announced.

news.title:
Wipro announces senior management changes effective April 1, 2026.
Nagendra Bandaru becomes CEO of AI Platforms; Kanwar Singh to lead Technology Services GBLs.
news.summary:
Wipro announces senior management changes effective April 1, 2026.
Nagendra Bandaru becomes CEO of AI Platforms; Kanwar Singh to lead Technology Services GBLs.
